creator: girgen@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Palle Girgensohn from comment #12)
I see now that the locale was added in 2002:


commit 33b7947a7503193284ebd58fa2f2f4fa208aed1c
Author: Andrey A. Chernov <ache@FreeBSD.org>
Date:   Sat Oct 19 12:59:19 2002 +0000

    Add sr_YU locales
    Submitted by: Toni Andjelkovic <toni@soth.at>




and later removed in 2015:

commit 1a41e1f147df55c8c160aa6438408879cf9790e3
Author: Baptiste Daroussin <bapt@FreeBSD.org>
Date:   Sat Aug 8 01:45:53 2015 +0000

    Add newly generated locales from CLDR 27.0.1
    only skip timedef until I figure out how to workaround svn painful mime-type handling



I assume you updated the system from source (i.e. with make)? Perhaps there's a lack of feature in the `make delele-old` make target, that it does not remove locales that are removed?

I hop you're OK with me closing this ticket. If you can verify that the make target ignores removal of locales, we should create a fresh ticket for that issue.


Cheers,
Palle
